name: HashMap put() Operation Flow
chatResponse: I will provide a visual flowchart mapping out the internal logic of the HashMap `put` operation, including hashing, collision resolution, and the Java 8 treeification process.

steps.title: Hashing and Index Mapping
steps.content: When a key-value pair is inserted, the key's `hashCode()` is retrieved and passed through a supplemental hash function to ensure a uniform distribution. The final bucket index is determined using a bitwise AND: `index = (n - 1) & hash`, which is a high-performance alternative to the modulo operator.

steps.title: Bucket Access and Key Comparison
steps.content: The JVM checks the calculated bucket index in the internal `Node[] table`. If the bucket is empty, a new node is created. If it is occupied, the system compares the existing key with the new key using both `==` (for identity) and `.equals()` (for content). If they match, the existing value is overwritten.

steps.title: Collision Resolution Strategy
steps.content: If the keys differ but hash to the same bucket, a collision occurs. Historically, Java handled this with a **LinkedList**. However, in Java 8+, if the number of nodes in a single bucket exceeds a threshold (8), the list is transformed into a **Red-Black Tree** to keep search performance at $O(\log n)$ rather than $O(n)$.

visualCode:
graph TD
    Start([put key, value]) --> Hash[Compute hash = hash_func key.hashCode]
    Hash --> Index[index = n-1 & hash]
    Index --> Empty{Bucket Empty?}
    
    Empty -- Yes --> CreateNode[Create New Node at index]
    Empty -- No --> CompareKeys{Key exists? hash == h && key.equals}
    
    CompareKeys -- Yes --> UpdateValue[Overwrite existing value]
    CompareKeys -- No --> CheckTree{Is Bucket a TreeNode?}
    
    CheckTree -- Yes --> PutTree[Insert into Red-Black Tree]
    CheckTree -- No --> PutList[Append to LinkedList]
    
    PutList --> Threshold{List Size > 8?}
    Threshold -- Yes --> Treeify[Convert List to Red-Black Tree]
    Threshold -- No --> End([Operation Complete])
    
    CreateNode --> End
    UpdateValue --> End
    PutTree --> End
    Treeify --> End
